title: JSON input uses PUT semantics for collections; CLI flags use PATCH semantics
description: When --json provides labels, linked_requirements, or metadata, those values replace the existing collection entirely (PUT). When CLI flags like --add-label, --remove-label, --add-link, --remove-link, --set-meta, or --remove-meta are used, they mutate the existing collection in place (PATCH). CLI flags take precedence over --json when both are supplied.
